Video.summary: Wayne doesn't know his fiancee, Kristin, is sleeping with her cousin! Next Springer Cam is there when JB drops the bomb on both of his girlfriends and tells them he's been cheating. Later Vinnie is sleeping with his best friend's fiancee, Shannon.
Video.title: Engagements Explode!

Video.summary: Our guests today have been wrapped around their lovers fingers and their finally ready to put a ring on it.
Video.title: Bridal Bombshells

Video.summary: Matt’s latest affair with Danielle’s mom’s roommate could be her mom’s breaking point! John has been experimenting with his roommate Ray behind Mahogany’s back! Rich is ready to ditch Tina for her more mature mom Shelly!
Video.title: I Want A Divorce!

Video.summary: After seven years of marriage and four kids, Evren and Crystal are still cheating on each other. Can their future really look any brighter! Then Sarah's not about to lose her first love Jeremy, but his cheating ways are reaching a boiling point!
Video.title: Face It...I Don't Want You!

Video.summary: Hollie fears that her husband is cheating again; Zach is running out of time to come clean to his wife about an affair he had with their neighbor; Quinton tells his fiancee about his recent fling with an old flame.
Video.title: Megabeast Unleashed

Video.summary: Antoine has been hiding the fact that he is gay from his family and his girlfriend. Now he wants to let them know the truth, and furthermore that he has been having a relationship with his sisters boyfriend.
Video.title: A Gay Family Affair

Video.summary: A man wants to get back with his ex-girlfriend; a woman seeks to end two relationships; a man tries to save his marriage.
Video.title: Bring It, Bro!

Video.summary: Tiffany wants to escalate things with her workout partner, but he has eyes for a woman who is hiding her true identity; Sammie says he offered a woman sex instead of money when he lost a bet to her; Brianna has feelings for her pool-playing buddy.
Video.title: Sexercise Me

Video.summary: Lynne kicked her husband out for cheating and now he's living in her front yard in a box! Next Sam says he's always wanted to see 2 women sleep together so he made a peculiar agreement with his cousin.
Video.title: I Live In A Box!

Video.summary: Beep runs a convenience store and he's fallen in love with the girlfriend of one of the patrons.
Video.title: Amazing Tales IV

Video.summary: A man cheats with his girlfriend's cousin; a man cheats on his wife with his ex-lover.
Video.title: Unemployed Men Vs. Angry Gals

Video.summary: After Mike became a dad, he felt trapped and bored from fatherhood and found Liz! Sherrie fights to win Don back from his gay lover Warren! Gloria’s matchmaking days are over as her best friend Andrea slept with her fiancé!
Video.title: I Need More Than You

Video.summary: Antiatte's friend and sister determine whether she will accept her boyfriend's marriage proposal; two women battle it out for a porn star's love; Britanny says something is fishy about her boyfriend's behavior.
Video.title: Proposal Do-Over

Video.summary: Tish finds bad news while snooping through her friend's cell phone; Kalia wants Victoria's boyfriend; CJ blames his wife for his infidelity.
Video.title: Selfie Destruction

Video.summary: After their sex life hit the dumps, Andrew searched for satisfaction and found it with his girlfriends sister! Then Desi will do anything to keep Melissa from leaving her behind, but sleeping with her cousin was not something she planned on!
Video.title: Your Sister Gave It Up!

Video.summary: Richie will tell Shelly he has been sleeping with DeeDee, a transsexual and Lesley, a transgender female. Then Gina will confess to her boyfriend, Rob, that she is sleeping with his best friend, Joe!
Video.title: Naughty Lovers Confronted

Video.summary: For the past 5 years, Trisha has been having a secret affair with her mother's boyfriend, Don! Next Daniel regrets the day he agreed to a threesome because now he's about to lose his fiancee forever.
Video.title: Mom, I'm Marrying Your Man!

Video.summary: Brittany's twin seems ready, willing and able to pick up her slack; Junior offers his wife a symbolic gesture of his love and commitment, but she has moved on; Becca is crazy about her boyfriend.
Video.title: I Had Sex With My Baby Mama's Twin

Image.alt: I Had Sex With My Baby Mama's Twin
I Had Sex With My Baby Mama's Twin
I Had Sex With My Baby Mama's Twin

Video.summary: D'Handsome wants to call off his engagement; Jeff wants a threesome; Jamie's boyfriend hooked up with another woman.
Video.title: Smothered ... With Sauce

Video.summary: Keisha's not only been disappointed with boyfriend Raymond's career choice selling DVD's on the street, but also his performance in bed. Then, not only did Desean cheat, he broke one of the sacred rules and slept with Dawntavia's best friend!
Video.title: Wild One Night Stands

Video.summary: Alex, who left his girlfriend while she was pregnant, wants her back; Ciarra faces Trice's wrath for sleeping with her boyfriend.
Video.title: Halloween: I'm Sorry Boo

Video.summary: Alex refuses to lose his ex-girlfriend without a fight; CeeCee needs to reveal her true identity to her online crush; Kyle and his sister have secrets to confess.
Video.title: You're Not Man Enough

Video.summary: Colby says he stays with Brentnie only for the sake of the children; Melissa's brother catches her kissing a man and tells the man's girlfriend; Sam wants to win back his girlfriend but learns that she has found someone else.
Video.title: Men Acting Fishy

Video.summary: They say that money makes the world go round. These guests say that they make money by laying on their backs!
Video.title: Prostitutes Tell All

Video.summary: Brittany's got a bone to pick with Brandi, a stripper that keeps getting in the way of her happiness. Then Jeremy finally found a girl just like dear old mom, but too bad mom is a stripper, and hence girlfriend Jessica is too.
Video.title: Stripper Tales

Video.summary: Aubrey wants out of his relationship with his angry, bossy girlfriend; Savonnah says she does not trust her girlfriend; Victoria met a woman on a dating website, but secretly has a crush on the woman's brother.
Video.title: I Stopped Being a Lesbian for You

Image.alt: I Stopped Being a Lesbian for You
I Stopped Being a Lesbian for You
I Stopped Being a Lesbian for You

Video.summary: Bre has good reason to think Austin is cheating on her; Michael regrets his actions and hopes his plea can convince Bria to forgive him; Jeremy confesses his feelings for another man's girlfriend through a romantic rap.
Video.title: Sideline Chicks Smackdown

Video.summary: Trina has a surprise for Larry; Edwin wants to end things with Sadee; Shamm and Nita.
Video.title: Thirsty For a Transsexual

Video.summary: Nicole wants her boyfriend back but only if he'll end his threesome. Next Mesha's been in love with her husband's best friend, Jamie, for four years, but she won't take "No" for an answer.
Video.title: Stay Out of My Threesome!

Video.summary: Sarah's here for Jonathan. The only problem is Lana, her best friend, who just happens to be Jonathan's girlfriend. Next Kung-fu family feud! David's here to let his brother, Lil Wayne, know that he has been sleeping with his girlfriend Ashley.
Video.title: Kung Fu Hillbilly!

Video.summary: Lisa won’t sign for a divorce after her husband left. Then, Damyen confronts the man who stole his girlfriend!
Video.title: Love Affairs Disasters

Video.summary: Dewight and Tiffany hit their breaking point when she learned he was cheating with her cousin Stacy! Pro cock fighter Johnny slept with Ashly and his girlfriend Ashley is steamed! Warren’s transsexual girlfriend has a big secret!
Video.title: Cheaters Confronted
